metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace. Hosts the `mavitalk` plugin — a bundle of reusable, project-agnostic workflow skills shared across all repos and machines.

plugins.name: mavitalk
plugins.description: Bundle of reusable, project-agnostic Claude Code workflow skills plus user-only session commands (/mavitalk:start-session, /mavitalk:end-session) for resume and end-of-session wrap-up (independent verification + handoff + clean commit), with a built-in cost layer (opusplan profile, cost advisories, token-economy standards). Each skill reads gates/conventions/language from the project's own files.
